query:
SELECT 
  e.id as equipe_id,
  e.nome as equipe_nome,
  e.gestorId,
  g.name as gestor_nome,
  g.email as gestor_email,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_corretores
FROM equipes e
LEFT JOIN users g ON e.gestorId = g.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.equipeId = e.id AND u.role = 'corretor'
WHERE g.email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com'
GROUP BY e.id, e.nome, e.gestorId, g.name, g.email;
